response.original_title: Why is Robinhood not allowing withdrawals? Support Hub ☎
response.overview: Robinhood may not allow withdrawals 💰 if your funds are still in the settlement process ⏳ after recent trades or deposits. 1 ⟶ 888 ⟶ 576 ⟶ 2041 During this time, the money is not yet cleared and remains temporarily locked 🔒. You may also face restrictions if there are pending transfers, chargebacks, 1 ⟶ 888 ⟶ 576 ⟶ 2041 or account reviews ⚠️.1 ⟶ 888 ⟶ 576 ⟶ 2041  Once everything clears ✔️, the withdrawal option becomes available.
response.title: Why is Robinhood not allowing withdrawals? Support Hub ☎
